item.title: Why TMS is No Longer Enough
item.description: The translation industry must evolve beyond traditional TMS to embrace AI and Quality Estimation technology, ensuring cultural intelligence and brand integrity.

item.title: New TAUS EPIC Features for Scalable and Smarter Quality Estimation
item.description: Discover how all the new EPIC features give even more flexibility in handling Quality Estimation and Automated Post Editing on your content.

item.title: Customized Quality Estimation models: Are you ready for them?
item.description: TAUS EPIC API's customizable Quality Estimation models can enhance translation workflows and meet specific needs without requiring in-house NLP expertise.

item.title: A Case for Launching Your Own AI Quality Companion
item.description: Explore how TAUS EPIC API's Quality Estimation can revolutionize translation workflows, that offer scalable, domain-specific solutions for Language Service Providers without the need for in-house NLP experts.

item.title: TRSB Joins TAUS EPIC Partner Program
item.description: TRSB partners with TAUS to develop a specialized Canadian French Quality Estimation model, enhancing multilingual content quality scalability in Canada.

item.title: EPIC in Numbers: See How Much You Can Save with Quality Estimation and Automated Post Editing
item.description: See your translation ROI with Quality Estimation (QE) and Automatic Post-Editing (APE). Find out how EPIC can reduce post-editing costs by up to 70% while improving efficiency.

item.title: Why Using LLMs for Quality Estimation Is Challenging and Complex
item.description: LLMs' limitations on QE tasks versus more specific solutions like TAUS EPIC

item.title: TAUS Offers Real-World Data for AI Training through Partnership with Library of Business
item.description: TAUS partners with Library of Business to provide industry-specific datasets for AI training, enhancing the performance of small language models and addressing evolving data needs.
